name: Titus Graimitus

sheet.name: Titus Graimitus
sheet.background_story:
Since the beginning of the new cycle, Titus has gone unnoticed, for many, this could be considered luck and for many others a misfortune. 

But since the flames of the church reached the sky, something changed in Titus' destiny, "Her" face was drawn on the clouds and then he knew he had to support the cause of Agora.

Died at the battle of the Church of Her.
